+## Р РөРәРҫРјРөРҪРҙСғСҺ РҝСғСӮСҢ C. Р’РҫСӮ РҝРҫСҮРөРјСғ РёРјРөРҪРҪРҫ РөРіРҫ.
+
+Р•РҙРёРҪСҒСӮРІРөРҪРҪРҫРө Р¶С‘СҒСӮРәРҫРө РҫРіСҖР°РҪРёСҮРөРҪРёРө CEO вҖ” В«РіР»Р°РІРҪРҫРө СҮСӮРҫРұСӢ РұСӢР»Р° РәР°Рә СҮР°СҒСӮСҢ СҚРәРҫСҒРёСҒСӮРөРјСӢВ». РҹСғСӮСҢ C РҪРө *СҮР°СҒСӮСҢ* СҚРәРҫСҒРёСҒСӮРөРјСӢ, РҫРҪ *СӮРәР°РҪСҢ* СҚРәРҫСҒРёСҒСӮРөРјСӢ. РҡР°Р¶РҙСӢР№ user-event РІ VOLAURA (`assessment_completed`, `badge_earned`, `crystal_earned`) РҪРөРјРөРҙР»РөРҪРҪРҫ СҒСӮР°РҪРҫРІРёСӮСҒСҸ СҒРҫРұСӢСӮРёРөРј РІ Life Feed РұРөР· РҫСӮРҙРөР»СҢРҪРҫР№ СҒРёРҪС…СҖРҫРҪРёР·Р°СҶРёРё. РӯСӮРҫ reverse the polarity вҖ” РІРјРөСҒСӮРҫ В«Life Sim СӮСҸРҪРөСӮ VOLAURA РҙР°РҪРҪСӢРө РҝРҫ APIВ», Life Feed = РҝСҖРҫРөРәСҶРёСҸ РҪР° user's VOLAURA РҝСҖРҫС„РёР»СҢ.
+
+Vision Canon РёР· SYNC В§0 РіРҫРІРҫСҖРёСӮ: В«РәР°СҮРөСҒСӮРІРҫ, Р°РҙР°РҝСӮРёРІРҪРҫСҒСӮСҢ, Р¶РёРІРҫР№ Atlas > СҒРәРҫСҖРҫСҒСӮСҢ Рё РәРҫР»РёСҮРөСҒСӮРІРҫ С„РёСҮВ». РҡР°СҮРөСҒСӮРІРҫ РҪР° Leyla-РјРҫРұРёР»Рө РҫРҝСҖРөРҙРөР»СҸРөСӮ СғСҒРҝРөС… РҝСҖРҫРҙСғРәСӮР° вҖ” РҝСғСӮСҢ A Р·Р°РІР°Р»РёСӮ СҚСӮСғ РјРөСӮСҖРёРәСғ. РҹСғСӮСҢ B Р·Р°РұРөСҖС‘СӮ 3 РҪРөРҙРөР»Рё РәРҫРіРҙР° СҒРҝСҖРёРҪСӮ С…РҫСҮРөСӮ Р·Р°РәСҖСӢСӮСҢ E1-E7 Р·Р° 14 РҙРҪРөР№. РҹСғСӮСҢ C РҙР°С‘СӮ РҝРөСҖРІСғСҺ РІРөСҖСҒРёСҺ Feed Р·Р° 3-5 РҙРҪРөР№ Atlas-РІСҖРөРјРөРҪРё.

+
+## РҡР°Рә Life Feed РІСӢРіР»СҸРҙРёСӮ РІ VOLAURA
+
+Р”РҫРұР°РІР»СҸРөСӮСҒСҸ РҪРҫРІСӢР№ РҪР°РІРёРіР°СҶРёРҫРҪРҪСӢР№ РҝСғРҪРәСӮ `/[locale]/life` РІ dashboard. РЎСӮСҖР°РҪРёСҶР° вҖ” РІРөСҖСӮРёРәР°Р»СҢРҪР°СҸ Р»РөРҪСӮР° В«Р¶РёР·РҪРөРҪРҪСӢС… РіР»Р°РІВ». РўСҖРё Р·РҫРҪСӢ.
+
+**Р’РөСҖС… вҖ” Character Stats Sidebar.** 6 РәСҖСғРіРҫРІСӢС… РёРҪРҙРёРәР°СӮРҫСҖРҫРІ (health, happiness, energy, intelligence, social, + crystals). Р—РҪР°СҮРөРҪРёСҸ СӮСҸРҪСғСӮСҒСҸ РёР· `character_events` Р°РіСҖРөРіР°СӮР° (СғР¶Рө РөСҒСӮСҢ С„СғРҪРәСҶРёСҸ РІ Supabase). РһРұРҪРҫРІР»СҸСҺСӮСҒСҸ СҖРөР°Р»СҢРҪРҫ-РІСҖРөРјРөРҪРҪРҫ РҪР° push РёР· backend СҮРөСҖРөР· websocket (РәРҫСӮРҫСҖСӢР№ Сғ РҪР°СҒ РөСҒСӮСҢ РІ assessment). РЎСӮР°СӮ-РұСғСҒСӮСӢ РҫСӮ VOLAURA-РәРҫРјРҝРөСӮРөРҪСҶРёР№ РІРёРҙРҪСӢ СҒСҖР°Р·Сғ вҖ” РөСҒР»Рё РҪРөРҙР°РІРҪРҫ РҝСҖРҫСҲС‘Р» communication assessment, social РІСӢСҖРҫСҒ РҪР° +10 СҮРөСҖРөР· РҪРөСҒРәРҫР»СҢРәРҫ СҒРөРәСғРҪРҙ.
+
+**РҰРөРҪСӮСҖ вҖ” Life Chapter Feed.** Р’РөСҖСӮРёРәР°Р»СҢРҪР°СҸ timeline РҝРҫСҒР»РөРҙРҪРёС… 30 РҙРҪРөР№. РҡР°Р¶РҙР°СҸ РәР°СҖСӮРҫСҮРәР° = РҫРҙРёРҪ event, РҫС„РҫСҖРјР»РөРҪР° РәР°Рә РҙРҪРөРІРҪРёРәРҫРІР°СҸ Р·Р°РҝРёСҒСҢ. РўСҖРё СӮРёРҝР° РәР°СҖСӮРҫСҮРөРә:
+
+1. *Reflection* вҖ” Р°РІСӮРҫРјР°СӮРёСҮРөСҒРәРё РҝРҫСҒР»Рө assessment (В«РўСӢ РІР»РҫР¶РёР»(Р°) 15 РјРёРҪСғСӮ РІ communication. РӯСӮРҫ РІРёРҙРҪРҫ РІ СӮРҫРј, РәР°Рә СӮСӢ Р·Р°РіРҫРІРҫСҖРёСҲСҢ РҪР° СҒРҫРұРөСҒРөРҙРҫРІР°РҪРёРёВ»)
+2. *Choice* вҖ” event РёР· РҝСғР»Р° 53 JSON, РҝСҖРөРҙР»Р°РіР°РөСӮ 2-4 РІР°СҖРёР°РҪСӮР°. Р’СӢРұРҫСҖ POST'РёСӮ РІ `/api/character/events` СҒ typom `lifesim_choice_<id>`, РәРҫРҪСҒРөРәРІРөРҪСҶРёРё РҝСҖРёРјРөРҪСҸСҺСӮСҒСҸ Рә stats СҮРөСҖРөР· СҒСғСүРөСҒСӮРІСғСҺСүРёР№ DB function.
+3. *Milestone* вҖ” РҝСҖРё РҙРҫСҒСӮРёР¶РөРҪРёРё РҝРҫСҖРҫРіР° (age X, РёР»Рё 10 СҒРҫРІРөСҖСҲРөРҪРҪСӢС… РІСӢРұРҫСҖРҫРІ РҝРҫРҙСҖСҸРҙ, РёР»Рё РҝРөСҖРІСӢР№ Gold badge) СҖР°Р·РұР»РҫРәРёСҖСғРөСӮСҒСҸ chapter-РәР°СҖСӮРҫСҮРәР° СҒ РІРёР·СғР°Р»СҢРҪРҫ РҙСҖСғРіРёРј СӮРҫРҪРҫРј.
+
+**РқРёР· вҖ” Crystal Shop.** 4 Р°Р№СӮРөРјР° РәРҫРҝРёСҖСғСҺСӮСҒСҸ verbatim РёР· GAME-DESIGN.md: Premium training course 50 crystals (intelligence +10), Social event ticket 30 (social/happiness +5), Health insurance 100 (health decay halved 10 chapters), Career coach 75 (next promotion guaranteed). РҡР°Р¶РҙР°СҸ РҝРҫРәСғРҝРәР° = decrement `crystal_balance`, СҚРјРёСӮ `crystal_spent` event, СғСҒРёР»РөРҪРёРө РІ РұР»РёР¶Р°Р№СҲРөРј event-pool.
+
+**Aging reframe.** РқРёРәР°РәРёС… В«СҒРјРөСҖСӮРөР№В». Age-СҒРёСҒСӮРөРјР° Р·Р°РјРөРҪСҸРөСӮСҒСҸ РҪР° В«Р¶РёР·РҪРөРҪРҪСӢРө РіР»Р°РІСӢВ» вҖ” 1 chapter вүҲ 3-7 СҖРөР°Р»СҢРҪСӢС… РҙРҪРөР№ Р°РәСӮРёРІРҪРҫСҒСӮРё СҺР·РөСҖР° (РҪРө С„РёРәСҒРёСҖРҫРІР°РҪРҪСӢР№ timer). Р—Р°РІРөСҖСҲРөРҪРёРө chapter = РјРёРҪРё-СҖРёСӮСғР°Р» (РІСӢРұРҫСҖ trait, РҝСғРұР»РёРәР°СҶРёСҸ В«memoir cardВ» РҫРҝСҶРёРҫРҪР°Р»СҢРҪРҫ РҪР° AURA-РҝСҖРҫС„РёР»СҢ РҙР»СҸ РҫСҖРі-СҖРөРәСҖСғСӮРөСҖРҫРІ). РҡРҫРҪСҒСӮР°РҪСӮРёСҶРёСҸ Law 3 (shame-free) СҒРҫС…СҖР°РҪРөРҪР°.
+

+
+## Р§СӮРҫ РҙРөР»Р°СӮСҢ СҒ Godot-РәРҫРҙРҫРј CEO
+
+РқРө РІСӢРұСҖР°СҒСӢРІР°СӮСҢ. Godot-РҝСҖРҫРөРәСӮ СҒСӮР°РҪРҫРІРёСӮСҒСҸ **В«Life Simulator Deep ModeВ»** вҖ” РҫРҝСҶРёРҫРҪР°Р»СҢРҪРҫРө desktop-native РҝСҖРёР»РҫР¶РөРҪРёРө РҙР»СҸ РҝРҫР»СҢР·РҫРІР°СӮРөР»РөР№ РәРҫСӮРҫСҖСӢРө С…РҫСӮСҸСӮ РҝРҫР»РҪРҫСҶРөРҪРҪСӢР№ Playtika-style life-sim opty experience. Р‘РёР»РҙРёСӮСҒСҸ СҖР°Р· РҪР° Windows/Linux/Mac, СҒРәР°СҮРёРІР°РөСӮСҒСҸ РёР· РҝСҖРҫС„РёР»СҸ VOLAURA РәР°Рә reward РҝСҖРё РҙРҫСҒСӮРёР¶РөРҪРёРё Platinum badge. РӯСӮРҫ СҒСӮР°РҪРҫРІРёСӮСҒСҸ РҪРө launch-РұР»РҫРәРөСҖ, Р° В«РҝСҖРөРјРёСғРј surface РҙР»СҸ СҸРҙСҖР°В».
+
+5263 СҒСӮСҖРҫРәРё GDScript РҝСҖРё СҚСӮРҫРј Р¶РёРІСғСӮ вҖ” РёР· РҪРёС… 53 event JSON РҝРөСҖРөРҪРҫСҒСҸСӮСҒСҸ РІ VOLAURA `supabase/migrations/*_lifesim_events_seed.sql` РәР°Рә event-pool. РңР°РҝРҝРёРҪРі statвҶ’competency РёР· integration-spec РҝРөСҖРөРҪРҫСҒРёСӮСҒСҸ РІ `apps/api/app/services/lifesim.py` (РҪРҫРІСӢР№ РјРҫРҙСғР»СҢ). Character controller Р»РҫРіРёРәР° вҶ’ backend С„СғРҪРәСҶРёСҸ `apply_chapter_consequences(user_id, choice_id)`. Idle-monetization РҝРҫРәР° РҫСӮРәР»Р°РҙСӢРІР°РөСӮСҒСҸ (VOLAURA СғР¶Рө РёРјРөРөСӮ subscription tier upsell).

+## РҹРөСҖРІСӢРө 3 milestone РҙР»СҸ Life Feed MVP
+
+**M1 вҖ” Backend plumbing (1 РҙРөРҪСҢ Atlas).**
+РқРҫРІСӢР№ РјРҫРҙСғР»СҢ `apps/api/app/services/lifesim.py`. Seed-migration СҒ 53 event-pool (РәРҫРҪРІРөСҖСӮР°СҶРёСҸ РёР· Godot JSON РІ СӮР°РұР»РёСҮРҪСғСҺ С„РҫСҖРјСғ `lifesim_events`). Endpoints: `GET /api/lifesim/feed?since=<iso>` (РІРҫР·РІСҖР°СүР°РөСӮ timeline), `GET /api/lifesim/next-choice` (pop'РёСӮ РҫРҙРёРҪ РҙРҫСҒСӮСғРҝРҪСӢР№ event РёР· pool РҝРҫ РІРҫР·СҖР°СҒСӮСғ/stats/career С„РёР»СҢСӮСҖСғ), `POST /api/lifesim/choice` (РҝСҖРёРјРөРҪСҸРөСӮ consequence, РҝРёСҲРөСӮ РІ character_events). Rate limit `RATE_DEFAULT`. РўРөСҒСӮСӢ вҖ” happy path + С„РёР»СҢСӮСҖСӢ.

+**M2 вҖ” Frontend Life Feed page (2 РҙРҪСҸ Atlas).**
+`apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(dashboard)/life/page.tsx`. TanStack Query С…СғРәРё РҪР° feed + choice endpoints. Character Stats Sidebar вҖ” РҝРөСҖРөРёСҒРҝРҫР»СҢР·СғРөСӮ radar chart РәРҫРјРҝРҫРҪРөРҪСӮ РёР· assessment result page. Timeline РәРҫРјРҝРҫРҪРөРҪСӮ СҒ tabular-view + virtualization (react-window) РҙР»СҸ РҙРҫР»РіРёС… РёСҒСӮРҫСҖРёР№. Choice modal вҖ” РҝРөСҖРөРёСҒРҝРҫР»СҢР·СғРөСӮ assessment question modal СҲР°РұР»РҫРҪ. Р’СҒРө РәРҫРҝРёСҖР°Р№СӮ-СҒСӮСҖРҫРәРё СҮРөСҖРөР· i18next AZ/RU/EN.
+

+4 shop-item components. `POST /api/lifesim/purchase`. Spend-flow СҒ РҝРҫРҙСӮРІРөСҖР¶РҙРөРҪРёРөРј (modal В«РҹРҫСӮСҖР°СӮРёСӮСҢ 50 crystals РҪР° Premium training course?В»), post-purchase stat-boost event СҚРјРёСӮСӮРёСӮСҒСҸ Р°РІСӮРҫРјР°СӮРёСҮРөСҒРәРё. Analytics events: `lifesim_feed_viewed`, `lifesim_choice_submitted`, `lifesim_crystal_spent` СҒ РҝРҫР»РҪСӢРј РәРҫРҪСӮРөРәСҒСӮРҫРј (age, chapter, choice_id, stats_delta).
+
+**DoD РҙР»СҸ MVP:** Leyla РҪР° РјРҫРұРёР»Рө РҫСӮРәСҖСӢРІР°РөСӮ `/life` РҝРҫСҒР»Рө assessment. Р’РёРҙРёСӮ РәР°СҖСӮРҫСҮРәСғ В«Communication +15 вҶ’ social РІСӢСҖРҫСҒВ». РӣРёСҒСӮР°РөСӮ РІРҪРёР· вҖ” РІРёРҙРёСӮ event-card СҒ РІСӢРұРҫСҖРҫРј. Р”РөР»Р°РөСӮ РІСӢРұРҫСҖ вҖ” СҮРөСҖРөР· 300ms РІРёРҙРёСӮ РёР·РјРөРҪРөРҪРёРө stat. Р§РөСҖРөР· 3 СӮР°РәРёС… СҶРёРәР»Р° РІРёРҙРёСӮ Crystal Shop offer Рё РјРҫР¶РөСӮ РҝРҫСӮСҖР°СӮРёСӮСҢ Р·Р°СҖР°РұРҫСӮР°РҪРҪСӢРө crystals. Р’СҒС‘ РұРөР· РҝРөСҖРөР·Р°РіСҖСғР·РәРё, РІСҒС‘ РҪР° РјРҫРұРёР»СҢРҪРҫРј, РІСҒС‘ РҝРҫ Constitution.

+## Р§СӮРҫ СҸ С…РҫСҮСғ СғСҒР»СӢСҲР°СӮСҢ РҫСӮ CEO
+
+РһРҙРҪРҫ СҒР»РҫРІРҫ. В«Р”РөР»Р°Р№В» вҖ” РҪР°СҮРёРҪР°СҺ M1 РІ СҒР»РөРҙСғСҺСүРөР№ РёСӮРөСҖР°СҶРёРё. В«РҹРҫРіРҫРҙРёВ» вҖ” РҙРөСҖР¶Сғ РҙРҫРәСғРјРөРҪСӮ РәР°Рә substrate, Р¶РҙСғ РҝРөСҖРөСҒРјРҫСӮСҖР°. В«Р”СҖСғРіРҫР№ РҝСғСӮСҢВ» вҖ” СҖР°СҒСҒРәР°Р¶Рё РәР°РәРҫР№, РҝРөСҖРөР·Р°РҝРёСҲСғ РҙРҫРәСғРјРөРҪСӮ.

РӯСӮРҫ РҫРұСҖР°СӮРёРјРҫ (РјРёРіСҖР°СҶРёСҸ РёРҙРөРјРҝРҫСӮРөРҪСӮРҪР°, frontend-СҒСӮСҖР°РҪРёСҶР° РҙРҫ deploy РҪРёСҮРөРіРҫ РҪРө Р»РҫРјР°РөСӮ), РҫРұСҖР°СӮРёРјРҫСҒСӮСҢ РҝРҫР·РІРҫР»СҸРөСӮ РҙРөР№СҒСӮРІРҫРІР°СӮСҢ РұРөР· РҝРҫРҙСӮРІРөСҖР¶РҙРөРҪРёСҸ per operating-principles.md.

+

+2. 53 event JSON вҖ” РҝРөСҖРөРҪРҫСҒСҸСӮСҒСҸ РІ Р»СҺРұРҫРө РјРөСҒСӮРҫ, Р¶РёРІСғСӮ РІРөСҮРҪРҫ.

+4. GAME-DESIGN.md + INTEGRATION-SPEC.md вҖ” РҫСҒСӮР°СҺСӮСҒСҸ canonical reference, РҝСҖРҫСҒСӮРҫ РҝРҫР»СғСҮР°СӮ Р·Р°РіРҫР»РҫРІРҫРә В«Phase 2: Desktop Deep ModeВ».

Any future LifeSim dev copying that spec would have shipped broken stat-boost math and nobody would notice until a user complained their communication score wasn't affecting their character.

-Iteration 3: same class of bug in MindShift spec вҖ” JSON example showed `"skill_slug"` key. Fixed.

Fixed to `social, intelligence, energy` which are the real field names. The three spec fixes together mean MindShift + LifeSim implementations will ACTUALLY work against VOLAURA's contract instead of building against imagined shapes.
-
-Iteration 5: idempotency guards on `20260415140000_zeus_to_atlas_rename.sql`. The rename was applied to prod via a different migration name (`20260413203755_zeus_to_atlas_rename_v2`) so the canonical local file with bare `ALTER SCHEMA zeus RENAME TO atlas` would fail on any db already past the rename вҖ” dev clones, test harnesses, DR restores. Wrapped all operations in IF EXISTS / NOT EXISTS guards.
-
-Pattern across all five: VOLAURA-side contract hygiene. Documentation and migrations were silently drifted from reality; prod was fine because prod already had the right state but a fresh clone or a spec-following external dev would have tripped. The fixes are invisible today and load-bearing tomorrow.

### STAT
.../20260416050000_lifesim_events_table.sql        | 195 +++++++++++++++++++++
 1 file changed, 195 insertions(+)

### KEY DIFFS (priority files)
diff --git a/supabase/migrations/20260416050000_lifesim_events_table.sql b/supabase/migrations/20260416050000_lifesim_events_table.sql
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..d368e81
--- /dev/null
+++ b/supabase/migrations/20260416050000_lifesim_events_table.sql
@@ -0,0 +1,195 @@
+-- Lifesim events table + seed вҖ” Life Feed inside VOLAURA (M1 step 2)
+-- Source: docs/life-simulator/events/godot-export-2026-04-15.json (53 events)
+-- Per docs/LIFE-SIMULATOR-REIMAGINE-2026-04-15.md Path C
+
+CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.lifesim_events (
+    id              TEXT PRIMARY KEY,
+    category        TEXT NOT NULL,
+    title_ru        TEXT NOT NULL,
+    description_ru  TEXT NOT NULL,
+    min_age         INT,
+    max_age         INT,
+    required_stats  JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
+    choices         JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb,
+    extra           JSONB NOT NULL DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
+    is_active       BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT TRUE,
+    created_at      TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW()
+);
+
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_lifesim_events_category ON public.lifesim_events(category) WHERE is_active = TRUE;
+CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_lifesim_events_age ON public.lifesim_events(min_age, max_age) WHERE is_active = TRUE;
+
+ALTER TABLE public.lifesim_events ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;
+
+-- Event pool is public to all authenticated users (read-only).
+-- Only service_role writes via /lifesim admin endpoints (future).
+DROP POLICY IF EXISTS "lifesim_events_read_all" ON public.lifesim_events;
+CREATE POLICY "lifesim_events_read_all" ON public.lifesim_events
+    FOR SELECT
+    USING (auth.role() IS NOT NULL);
+
+COMMENT ON TABLE public.lifesim_events IS 'Life Simulator event pool вҖ” 53 events extracted from Godot project 2026-04-15. Served to Life Feed surface in VOLAURA web. Read-only to users, writes via service_role only.';
+
+-- Seed 53 events from canonical JSON
+-- INSERT ... ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING so re-runs are idempotent
+INSERT INTO public.lifesim_events (id, category, title_ru, description_ru, min_age, max_age, required_stats, choices, extra)
+VALUES ('edu_school_001', 'education', 'РӯРәР·Р°РјРөРҪ РІ СҲРәРҫР»Рө', 'Р—Р°РІСӮСҖР° РІР°Р¶РҪСӢР№ СҚРәР·Р°РјРөРҪ. РһСӮ СҖРөР·СғР»СҢСӮР°СӮРҫРІ Р·Р°РІРёСҒРёСӮ СӮРІРҫС‘ РҙР°Р»СҢРҪРөР№СҲРөРө РҫРұСҖР°Р·РҫРІР°РҪРёРө.', 6, 17, '{}'::jsonb, '[{"text_ru": "РЈСҒРөСҖРҙРҪРҫ РіРҫСӮРҫРІРёСӮСҢСҒСҸ РІСҒСҺ РҪРҫСҮСҢ", "consequences": {"intelligence": 10, "energy": -30, "health": -10, "happiness": -5}}, {"text_ru": "Р“РҫСӮРҫРІРёСӮСҢСҒСҸ СғРјРөСҖРөРҪРҪРҫ, РІСӢСҒСӢРҝР°СӮСҢСҒСҸ", "consequences": {"intelligence": 5, "energy": -10, "health": 5, "happiness": 10}}, {"text_ru": "РҹРҫРҝСҖРҫСҒРёСӮСҢ РҝРҫРјРҫСүРё Сғ СғРјРҪСӢС… РҙСҖСғР·РөР№", "consequences": {"intelligence": 3, "energy": -15, "social": 20, "happiness": 5}}]'::jsonb, '{"is_repeatable": true, "cooldown_days": 7, "tags": ["school", "exam", "education"], "category_code": 4}'::jsonb)
+ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;
+INSERT INTO public.lifesim_events (id, category, title_ru, description_ru, min_age, max_age, required_stats, choices, extra)
+VALUES ('edu_university_001', 'education', 'РҹРҫСҒСӮСғРҝР»РөРҪРёРө РІ СғРҪРёРІРөСҖСҒРёСӮРөСӮ', 'РҹСҖРёСҲР»Рҫ РІСҖРөРјСҸ РІСӢРұРёСҖР°СӮСҢ СғРҪРёРІРөСҖСҒРёСӮРөСӮ. +INSERT INTO public.lifesim_events (id, category, title_ru, description_ru, min_age, max_age, required_stats, choices, extra)

РңРёСҖ РҫРіСҖРҫРјРөРҪ Рё РҝРҫР»РҫРҪ РІРҫР·РјРҫР¶РҪРҫСҒСӮРөР№.', 0, 0, '{}'::jsonb, '[{"text_ru": "Р“СҖРҫРјРәРҫ РҝР»Р°РәР°СӮСҢ (Р·РҙРҫСҖРҫРІСӢР№ СҖРөРұС‘РҪРҫРә)", "consequences": {"health": 10, "energy": 10, "happiness": 10}}, {"text_ru": "РЎРҝР°СӮСҢ СҒРҝРҫРәРҫР№РҪРҫ (СҒРҝРҫРәРҫР№РҪСӢР№ СҖРөРұС‘РҪРҫРә)", "consequences": {"health": 5, "energy": 15, "happiness": 5}}]'::jsonb, '{"is_repeatable": false, "tags": ["birth", "milestone", "beginning"], "category_code": 8}'::jsonb)
+ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;
+INSERT INTO public.lifesim_events (id, category, title_ru, description_ru, min_age, max_age, required_stats, choices, extra)
+VALUES ('milestone_first_steps_001', 'milestone', 'РҹРөСҖРІСӢРө СҲР°РіРё', 'РўСӢ РҙРөР»Р°РөСҲСҢ РҝРөСҖРІСӢРө РҪРөСғРІРөСҖРөРҪРҪСӢРө СҲР°РіРё. Р РҫРҙРёСӮРөР»Рё РІ РІРҫСҒСӮРҫСҖРіРө РҫСӮ СӮРІРҫРёС… РҙРҫСҒСӮРёР¶РөРҪРёР№.', 1, 2, '{}'::jsonb, '[{"text_ru": "РЎРҙРөР»Р°СӮСҢ СҲР°Рі Рә РјР°РјРө", "consequences": {"health": 5, "energy": 5, "happiness": 15, "social": 10}}, {"text_ru": "РЎРҙРөР»Р°СӮСҢ СҲР°Рі Рә РҝР°РҝРө", "consequences": {"health": 5, "energy": 5, "happiness": 15, "social": 10}}, {"text_ru": "РЈРҝР°СҒСӮСҢ Рё СҒРөСҒСӮСҢ", "consequences": {"health": 3, "energy": 8, "happiness": 5}}]'::jsonb, '{"is_repeatable": false, "tags": ["first_steps", "milestone", "development"], "category_code": 8}'::jsonb)
+ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;
+INSERT INTO public.lifesim_events (id, category, title_ru, description_ru, min_age, max_age, required_stats, choices, extra)
+VALUES ('milestone_first_school_001', 'milestone', 'РҹРөСҖРІСӢР№ РҙРөРҪСҢ РІ СҲРәРҫР»Рө', 'РўСӢ РІРҝРөСҖРІСӢРө РёРҙС‘СҲСҢ РІ СҲРәРҫР»Сғ. РқРҫРІСӢРө РҙСҖСғР·СҢСҸ, Р·РҪР°РҪРёСҸ Рё РҝРөСҖРөР¶РёРІР°РҪРёСҸ Р¶РҙСғСӮ СӮРөРұСҸ.', 6, 8, '{}'::jsonb, '[{"text_ru": "РЎ СҚРҪСӮСғР·РёР°Р·РјРҫРј РҝРҫР№СӮРё РІ РәР»Р°СҒСҒ", "consequences": {"intelligence": 10, "social": 20, "happiness": 20, "energy": -10}}, {"text_ru": "РһСҒСӮРҫСҖРҫР¶РҪРҫ РҫСҒРјРҫСӮСҖРөСӮСҢСҒСҸ", "consequences": {"intelligence": 5, "social": 10, "happiness": 10, "energy": -5}}, {"text_ru": "РҹРҫРҝСҖРҫСҒРёСӮСҢ РјР°РјСғ РҫСҒСӮР°СӮСҢСҒСҸ", "consequences": {"intelligence": 2, "social": 5, "happiness": 5, "energy": 5}}]'::jsonb, '{"is_repeatable": false, "tags": ["school", "milestone", "education"], "category_code": 8}'::jsonb)
+ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;
+INSERT INTO public.lifesim_events (id, category, title_ru, description_ru, min_age, max_age, required_stats, choices, extra)
+VALUES ('milestone_teenager_001', 'milestone', 'РҹРҫРҙСҖРҫСҒСӮРәРҫРІСӢР№ РІРҫР·СҖР°СҒСӮ', 'РўСӢ РІСҒСӮСғРҝР°РөСҲСҢ РІ СҒР»РҫР¶РҪСӢР№ РҝРҫРҙСҖРҫСҒСӮРәРҫРІСӢР№ РҝРөСҖРёРҫРҙ. Р“РҫСҖРјРҫРҪР°Р»СҢРҪСӢРө РёР·РјРөРҪРөРҪРёСҸ Рё РҝРҫРёСҒРә СҒРөРұСҸ.', 13, 17, '{}'::jsonb, '[{"text_ru": "РқР°Р№СӮРё СҒРІРҫС‘ С…РҫРұРұРё", "consequences": {"intelligence": 8, "social": 15, "happiness": 25, "energy": -10}}, {"text_ru": "РҹСҖРҫРІРҫРҙРёСӮСҢ РІСҖРөРјСҸ СҒ РҙСҖСғР·СҢСҸРјРё", "consequences": {"intelligence": 3, "social": 30, "happiness": 20, "energy": -15}}, {"text_ru": "РЈРҙРөР»РёСӮСҢ РІСҖРөРјСҸ СғСҮС‘РұРө", "consequences": {"intelligence": 15, "social": 5, "happiness": 10, "energy": -5}}]'::jsonb, '{"is_repeatable": false, "tags": ["teenager", "milestone", "development"], "category_code": 8}'::jsonb)
+ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;
+INSERT INTO public.lifesim_events (id, category, title_ru, description_ru, min_age, max_age, required_stats, choices, extra)
+VALUES ('milestone_adulthood_001', 'milestone', 'РЎРҫРІРөСҖСҲРөРҪРҪРҫР»РөСӮРёРө', 'РўРөРұРө РёСҒРҝРҫР»РҪРёР»РҫСҒСҢ 18 Р»РөСӮ! РҹРөСҖРөРҙ СӮРҫРұРҫР№ РҫСӮРәСҖСӢСӮ РјРёСҖ РІР·СҖРҫСҒР»СӢС… РІРҫР·РјРҫР¶РҪРҫСҒСӮРөР№ Рё РҫСӮРІРөСӮСҒСӮРІРөРҪРҪРҫСҒСӮРё.', 18, 18, '{}'::jsonb, '[{"text_ru": "РһСӮРјРөСӮРёСӮСҢ СҒ РҙСҖСғР·СҢСҸРјРё", "consequences": {"money": -5000, "happiness": 40, "social": 35, "energy": -20}}, {"text_ru": "РқР°СҮР°СӮСҢ РҝР»Р°РҪРёСҖРҫРІР°СӮСҢ РұСғРҙСғСүРөРө", "consequences": {"intelligence": 20, "happiness": 25, "energy": -10, "work_experience": 10}}, {"text_ru": "РҹРҫРіРҫРІРҫСҖРёСӮСҢ СҒ СҖРҫРҙРёСӮРөР»СҸРјРё Рҫ Р¶РёР·РҪРё", "consequences": {"social": 25, "happiness": 20, "energy": 5}}]'::jsonb, '{"is_repeatable": false, "tags": ["adulthood", "milestone", "freedom"], "category_code": 8}'::jsonb)
+ON CONFLICT (id) DO NOTHING;

+VALUES ('milestone_first_love_001', 'milestone', 'РҹРөСҖРІР°СҸ Р»СҺРұРҫРІСҢ', 'РўСӢ РІРҝРөСҖРІСӢРө РёСҒРҝСӢСӮСӢРІР°РөСҲСҢ СҮСғРІСҒСӮРІР° Р»СҺРұРІРё. +VALUES ('milestone_first_job_001', 'milestone', 'РҹРөСҖРІР°СҸ СҖР°РұРҫСӮР°', 'РўСӢ РҝРҫР»СғСҮРёР»(Р°) РҝРөСҖРІСғСҺ СҖР°РұРҫСӮСғ. Р’СҖРөРјСҸ РҝРҫРҙРІРҫРҙРёСӮСҢ РёСӮРҫРіРё.', 70, 100, '{}'::jsonb, '[{"text_ru": "РҹСҖРёРҪСҸСӮСҢ СҒСғРҙСҢРұСғ СҒ РҙРҫСҒСӮРҫРёРҪСҒСӮРІРҫРј", "consequences": {"happiness": 50, "social": 30, "peace": 100}}, {"text_ru": "Р‘РҫСҖРҫСӮСҢСҒСҸ РҙРҫ РҝРҫСҒР»РөРҙРҪРөРіРҫ", "consequences": {"health": 20, "happiness": 20, "energy": 20, "peace": 50}}, {"text_ru": "РҹСҖРҫСҒРёСӮСҢ РҝСҖРҫСүРөРҪРёСҸ Сғ РұР»РёР·РәРёС…", "consequences": {"happiness": 35, "social": 50, "peace": 80}}]'::jsonb, '{"is_repeatable": false, "tags": ["death", "milestone", "ending"], "category_code": 8}'::jsonb)

diff --git a/apps/api/app/services/lifesim.py b/apps/api/app/services/lifesim.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..3c17be8
--- /dev/null
+++ b/apps/api/app/services/lifesim.py
@@ -0,0 +1,244 @@
+"""Life Simulator service вҖ” pool query, stat mapping, consequence emission.
+
+Path C from docs/LIFE-SIMULATOR-REIMAGINE-2026-04-15.md: Life Feed lives inside
+VOLAURA web, sources events from the public.lifesim_events table (seeded by
+supabase/migrations/20260416050000_lifesim_events_table.sql), applies choice
+consequences, and writes audit events to character_events for ecosystem sync.
+
+This module hosts pure-function helpers + DB read/write primitives. Route-level
+composition lives in apps/api/app/routers/lifesim.py (next iteration).
+
+Cross-references:
+  - docs/LIFE-SIMULATOR-GAME-DESIGN.md вҖ” stat mapping + crystal economy
+  - docs/LIFE-SIMULATOR-INTEGRATION-SPEC.md вҖ” VOLAURA competency вҶ’ lifesim stat table
+  - app/services/ecosystem_events.py вҖ” pattern for character_events writes
+  - app/services/assessment/rewards.py вҖ” crystal_earned emitter
+"""
+
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+from typing import Any
+
+from loguru import logger
+
+# в”Җв”Җ Stat mapping from VOLAURA competency вҶ’ Life Sim character stats в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
+# Source: docs/LIFE-SIMULATOR-INTEGRATION-SPEC.md В§ "VOLAURA вҶ’ Life Simulator Stat Mapping"
+# Every multiplier is a deliberate tuning value вҖ” changes require coordination
+# with game-design.md to keep the economy balanced.
+
+_STAT_BOOSTS_BY_SLUG: dict[str, dict[str, float]] = {
+    "communication": {"social": 0.10},
+    "reliability": {"energy": 0.05},
+    "tech_literacy": {"intelligence": 0.10},
+    "leadership": {"social": 0.05, "happiness": 0.03},
+    "adaptability": {"energy": 0.05},
+    "empathy_safeguarding": {"happiness": 0.05},
+    "english_proficiency": {"intelligence": 0.05},
+    "event_performance": {"happiness": 0.05},
+}
+
+_STAT_CAP = 100.0
+_CRYSTAL_BALANCE_CAP = 9999
+
+
+def apply_stat_boosts_from_verified_skills(skills: list[dict]) -> dict[str, float]:
+    """Compute additive stat boosts from a user's verified-skill list.
+
+    Pure function вҖ” no DB, no side effects. Designed for both backend
+    endpoint composition and unit testing.
+
+    Args:
+      skills: list of VerifiedSkillOut-shaped dicts: {slug, aura_score, badge_tier}
+
+    Returns:
+      dict mapping stat name вҶ’ additive boost value (always non-negative, capped
+      so individual stats cannot exceed _STAT_CAP when summed by caller).
+    """
+    boosts: dict[str, float] = {
+        "social": 0.0,
+        "intelligence": 0.0,
+        "energy": 0.0,
+        "happiness": 0.0,
+    }
+    for skill in skills:
+        slug = skill.get("slug", "")
+        score = float(skill.get("aura_score", 0.0))
+        if score <= 0:
+            continue
+        mapping = _STAT_BOOSTS_BY_SLUG.get(slug, {})
+        for stat, multiplier in mapping.items():
+            boosts[stat] = boosts.get(stat, 0.0) + (score * multiplier)
+    return boosts
+
+
+def apply_consequences_to_stats(
+    current_stats: dict[str, float], consequences: dict[str, float]
+) -> dict[str, float]:
+    """Apply a choice's consequences to current stats, with clamping.
+
+    Pure function. Stats clamp to [0, _STAT_CAP] except 'money' which is
+    unbounded (but capped at _CRYSTAL_BALANCE_CAP when money source is crystals).
+
+    Args:
+      current_stats: dict of current stat values
+      consequences: dict of deltas (+ or -)
+
+    Returns:
+      new stats dict with deltas applied and clamped.
+    """
+    new_stats = dict(current_stats)
+    for stat, delta in consequences.items():
+        current = float(new_stats.get(stat, 0.0))
+        value = current + float(delta)
+        if stat == "money":
+            # money may be negative (debt), not capped top-side by stat system
+            new_stats[stat] = value
+        else:
+            new_stats[stat] = max(0.0, min(_STAT_CAP, value))
+    return new_stats
+
+
+def filter_pool_for_user(
+    pool: list[dict], *, age: int, stats: dict[str, float]
+) -> list[dict]:
+    """Filter event pool down to events this user currently qualifies for.
+
+    Pure function. Criteria:
+      - age within [min_age, max_age] (both optional in the event)
+      - all required_stats met (stat >= required value)
+      - event is_active (already filtered by query, re-checked defensively)
+    """
+    eligible: list[dict] = []
+    for event in pool:
+        if not event.get("is_active", True):
+            continue
+        min_age = event.get("min_age")
+        max_age = event.get("max_age")
+        if min_age is not None and age < int(min_age):
+            continue
+        if max_age is not None and age > int(max_age):
+            continue
+        required = event.get("required_stats") or {}
+        ok = True
+        for req_stat, req_value in required.items():
+            if float(stats.get(req_stat, 0.0)) < float(req_value):
+                ok = False
+                break
+        if ok:
+            eligible.append(event)
+    return eligible
+
+
+async def query_event_pool(
+    db: Any,
+    *,
+    category: str | None = None,
+    limit: int = 50,
+) -> list[dict]:
+    """Fetch active events from lifesim_events table.
+
+    Args:
+      db: Supabase client (user or admin вҖ” RLS allows authenticated SELECT)
+      category: if provided, filter by category slug
+      limit: max rows to return
+
+    Returns:
+      list of event dicts with full shape (id, category, title_ru, description_ru,
+      min_age, max_age, required_stats, choices, extra, is_active).
+    """
+    query = db.table("lifesim_events").select("*").eq("is_active", True)
+    if category:
+        query = query.eq("category", category)
+    result = await query.limit(limit).execute()
+    return list(result.data or [])
+
+
+async def emit_lifesim_choice_event(
+    db: Any,
+    *,
+    user_id: str,
+    event_id: str,
+    choice_index: int,
+    consequences: dict[str, float],
+    source_product: str = "volaura",
+) -> None:
+    """Write a lifesim_choice event to character_events for ecosystem sync.
+
+    Mirrors the pattern in app/services/ecosystem_events.py. Fire-and-forget
+    style вҖ” caller should not block on this and errors are logged only.
+    Downstream consumers (MindShift, BrandedBy, Atlas Telegram bot) can poll
+    GET /api/character/events to react to user choices across the ecosystem.
+    """
+    try:
+        await (
+            db.table("character_events")
+            .insert(
+                {
+                    "user_id": user_id,
+                    "event_type": "lifesim_choice",
+                    "payload": {
+                        "event_id": event_id,
+                        "choice_index": choice_index,
+                        "consequences": consequences,
+                        "_schema_version": 1,
+                    },
+                    "source_product": source_product,
+                }
+            )
+            .execute()
+        )
+    except Exception as exc:
+        # Non-blocking: Life Feed must not break if ecosystem bus is slow
+        logger.warning(
+            "lifesim_choice emit failed",
+            user_id=user_id,
+            event_id=event_id,
+            error=str(exc)[:200],
+        )
+
+
+async def emit_lifesim_crystal_spent_event(
+    db: Any,
+    *,
+    user_id: str,
+    shop_item: str,
+    crystals_spent: int,
+    stat_boost: dict[str, float],
+) -> None:
+    """Write a lifesim_crystal_spent event when user purchases from Crystal Shop.
+
+    Crystal Shop items (from GAME-DESIGN.md):
+      - premium_training_course: 50 crystals вҶ’ intelligence +10
+      - social_event_ticket: 30 crystals вҶ’ social +5, happiness +5
+      - health_insurance: 100 crystals вҶ’ health decay halved for 10 chapters
+      - career_coach: 75 crystals вҶ’ next promotion guaranteed (flag)
+
+    The crystal decrement happens via the existing crystal_spent event type
+    (see app/routers/brandedby.py for precedent). This helper wraps the
+    lifesim-surface-specific metadata on top.
+    """
+    try:
+        await (
+            db.table("character_events")
+            .insert(
+                {
+                    "user_id": user_id,
+                    "event_type": "lifesim_crystal_spent",
+                    "payload": {
+                        "shop_item": shop_item,
+                        "crystals_spent": int(crystals_spent),
+                        "stat_boost": stat_boost,
+                        "_schema_version": 1,
+                    },
+                    "source_product": "volaura",
+                }
+            )
+            .execute()
+        )
+    except Exception as exc:
+        logger.warning(
+            "lifesim_crystal_spent emit failed",
+            user_id=user_id,
+            shop_item=shop_item,
+            error=str(exc)[:200],
+        )

@@ -0,0 +1,186 @@
+"""Unit tests for app.services.lifesim вҖ” pure functions only.
+
+Covers:
+  - apply_stat_boosts_from_verified_skills
+  - apply_consequences_to_stats (clamping)
+  - filter_pool_for_user (age + required_stats filtering)
+
+DB-side helpers (query_event_pool, emit_lifesim_*) are covered by integration
+tests in a later iteration that wires the router.
+"""
+
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+from app.services.lifesim import (
+    apply_consequences_to_stats,
+    apply_stat_boosts_from_verified_skills,
+    filter_pool_for_user,
+)
+
+# в”Җв”Җ apply_stat_boosts_from_verified_skills в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
+
+def test_stat_boosts_empty_skills():
+    assert apply_stat_boosts_from_verified_skills([]) == {
+        "social": 0.0,
+        "intelligence": 0.0,
+        "energy": 0.0,
+        "happiness": 0.0,
+    }
+
+
+def test_stat_boosts_single_communication():
+    skills = [{"slug": "communication", "aura_score": 80}]
+    boosts = apply_stat_boosts_from_verified_skills(skills)
+    # communication вҶ’ social * 0.10
+    assert boosts["social"] == 8.0
+    assert boosts["intelligence"] == 0.0
+
+
+def test_stat_boosts_leadership_splits_across_two_stats():
+    skills = [{"slug": "leadership", "aura_score": 100}]
+    boosts = apply_stat_boosts_from_verified_skills(skills)
+    # leadership вҶ’ social * 0.05 + happiness * 0.03
+    assert boosts["social"] == 5.0
+    assert boosts["happiness"] == 3.0

@@ -0,0 +1,294 @@
+"""Life Simulator Life Feed вҖ” MVP endpoints (Path C from reimagine doc).
+
+User surface:
+ вҖў GET  /api/lifesim/feed         вҖ” recent lifesim events for timeline
+ вҖў GET  /api/lifesim/next-choice  вҖ” pick one eligible event from the pool
+ вҖў POST /api/lifesim/choice       вҖ” apply choice consequences + log
+ вҖў POST /api/lifesim/purchase     вҖ” spend crystals on a shop item
+
+Reads pool from `lifesim_events` table (seeded by
+supabase/migrations/20260416050000_lifesim_events_table.sql).
+
+Writes audit + cross-product events to `character_events` so MindShift,
+BrandedBy, and Atlas Telegram can react (ecosystem bus вҖ” ADR-006).
+
+Service composition: see app/services/lifesim.py for pure logic + DB helpers.
+"""
+
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import random
+
+from fastapi import APIRouter, HTTPException, Query, Request
+from loguru import logger
+from pydantic import BaseModel, ConfigDict, Field
+
+from app.deps import CurrentUserId, SupabaseAdmin
+from app.middleware.rate_limit import RATE_DEFAULT, RATE_PROFILE_WRITE, limiter
+from app.services.lifesim import (
+    apply_consequences_to_stats,
+    emit_lifesim_choice_event,
+    emit_lifesim_crystal_spent_event,
+    filter_pool_for_user,
+    query_event_pool,
+)
+
+router = APIRouter(prefix="/lifesim", tags=["LifeSim"])
+
+# в”Җв”Җ Crystal Shop catalogue (from LIFE-SIMULATOR-GAME-DESIGN.md В§ Crystal Economy) в”Җв”Җ
+# Hardcoded in code for MVP. Future iteration: move to lifesim_shop_items table
+# so game designers can adjust pricing without migration.
+_CRYSTAL_SHOP: dict[str, dict] = {
+    "premium_training_course": {"cost": 50, "boost": {"intelligence": 10.0}},
+    "social_event_ticket": {"cost": 30, "boost": {"social": 5.0, "happiness": 5.0}},
+    "health_insurance": {"cost": 100, "boost": {"health": 10.0}},
+    "career_coach": {"cost": 75, "boost": {"career_bonus_flag": 1.0}},
+}
+
+_FEED_DEFAULT_LIMIT = 50
+_FEED_MAX_LIMIT = 200
+
+
+# в”Җв”Җ Schemas в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
+
+
+class ChoicePayload(BaseModel):
+    event_id: str = Field(..., min_length=1, max_length=64)
+    choice_index: int = Field(..., ge=0, le=9)
+    stats_before: dict[str, float] = Field(default_factory=dict)
+
+
+class ChoiceResponse(BaseModel):
+    model_config = ConfigDict(from_attributes=True)
+
+    event_id: str
+    choice_index: int
+    consequences: dict
+    stats_after: dict[str, float]
+
+
+class PurchasePayload(BaseModel):
+    shop_item: str = Field(..., min_length=1, max_length=64)
+    current_crystals: int = Field(..., ge=0)
+
+
+class PurchaseResponse(BaseModel):
+    shop_item: str
+    cost: int
+    remaining_crystals: int
+    stat_boost: dict[str, float]
+
+
+class FeedItem(BaseModel):
+    id: str
+    event_type: str
+    payload: dict
+    created_at: str
+
+
+class FeedResponse(BaseModel):
+    data: list[FeedItem]
+
+
+class NextChoiceResponse(BaseModel):
+    event: dict | None
+    pool_size: int
+
+
+# в”Җв”Җ Endpoints в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
+
+
+@router.get("/feed", response_model=FeedResponse)
+@limiter.limit(RATE_DEFAULT)
+async def get_feed(
+    request: Request,
+    user_id: CurrentUserId,
+    db: SupabaseAdmin,
+    limit: int = Query(default=_FEED_DEFAULT_LIMIT, ge=1, le=_FEED_MAX_LIMIT),
+) -> FeedResponse:
+    """Return recent lifesim events for the user вҖ” timeline rendering input.
+
+    Filters to lifesim_* event types (choice + crystal_spent) from
+    character_events so the client gets a clean Life Feed without all
+    other ecosystem noise.
+    """
+    result = await (
+        db.table("character_events")
+        .select("id, event_type, payload, created_at")
+        .eq("user_id", str(user_id))
+        .in_("event_type", ["lifesim_choice", "lifesim_crystal_spent"])
+        .order("created_at", desc=True)
+        .limit(limit)
+        .execute()
+    )
+    rows = result.data or []
+    return FeedResponse(data=[FeedItem(**row) for row in rows])
+
+
+@router.get("/next-choice", response_model=NextChoiceResponse)
+@limiter.limit(RATE_DEFAULT)
+async def get_next_choice(
+    request: Request,
+    user_id: CurrentUserId,
+    db: SupabaseAdmin,
+    age: int = Query(..., ge=6, le=100, description="Character age for pool filter"),
+    category: str | None = Query(default=None, max_length=32),
+    intelligence: float = Query(default=50, ge=0, le=100),
+    social: float = Query(default=50, ge=0, le=100),
+    energy: float = Query(default=50, ge=0, le=100),
+    happiness: float = Query(default=50, ge=0, le=100),
+    health: float = Query(default=50, ge=0, le=100),
+    money: float = Query(default=0, description="Unbounded вҖ” may be negative for debt"),
+    work_experience: float = Query(default=0, ge=0, le=100),
+) -> NextChoiceResponse:
+    """Pick one eligible event from the pool for presentation.
+
+    Age + stats come from query params вҖ” frontend maintains session state
+    between chapters. Future iteration: aggregate from character_events
+    server-side to remove client-side truth dependence.
+
+    Returns None event if the pool yielded no eligible row; client should
+    show an empty-chapter state in that case.
+    """
+    stats = {
+        "intelligence": intelligence,
+        "social": social,
+        "energy": energy,
+        "happiness": happiness,
+        "health": health,
+        "money": money,
+        "work_experience": work_experience,
+    }
+    pool = await query_event_pool(db, category=category, limit=_FEED_MAX_LIMIT)
+    eligible = filter_pool_for_user(pool, age=age, stats=stats)
+    if not eligible:
+        return NextChoiceResponse(event=None, pool_size=0)
+    picked = random.choice(eligible)
+    return NextChoiceResponse(event=picked, pool_size=len(eligible))
+
+
+@router.post("/choice", response_model=ChoiceResponse, status_code=201)
+@limiter.limit(RATE_PROFILE_WRITE)
+async def submit_choice(
+    request: Request,
+    payload: ChoicePayload,
+    user_id: CurrentUserId,
+    db: SupabaseAdmin,
+) -> ChoiceResponse:
+    """Apply the chosen choice's consequences and log the event.
+
+    Validates event + choice exist in the pool, computes new stats via
+    pure-function helper, then fires the character_events emit (non-blocking).
+    """
+    result = await (
+        db.table("lifesim_events")
+        .select("id, choices, is_active")
+        .eq("id", payload.event_id)
+        .single()
+        .execute()
+    )
+    event = getattr(result, "data", None) or {}
+    if not event or not event.get("is_active"):
+        raise HTTPException(
+            status_code=404,
+            detail={"code": "EVENT_NOT_FOUND", "message": "Event not in active pool"},
+        )
+    choices = event.get("choices") or []
+    if payload.choice_index >= len(choices):
+        raise HTTPException(
+            status_code=422,
+            detail={"code": "CHOICE_OUT_OF_RANGE", "message": "choice_index beyond event.choices"},
+        )
+    consequences = choices[payload.choice_index].get("consequences") or {}
+    stats_after = apply_consequences_to_stats(payload.stats_before, consequences)
+
+    await emit_lifesim_choice_event(
+        db,
+        user_id=str(user_id),
+        event_id=payload.event_id,
+        choice_index=payload.choice_index,
+        consequences=consequences,
+    )
+
+    return ChoiceResponse(
+        event_id=payload.event_id,
+        choice_index=payload.choice_index,
+        consequences=consequences,
+        stats_after=stats_after,
+    )
+
+
+@router.post("/purchase", response_model=PurchaseResponse, status_code=201)
+@limiter.limit(RATE_PROFILE_WRITE)
+async def purchase_shop_item(
+    request: Request,
+    payload: PurchasePayload,
+    user_id: CurrentUserId,
+    db: SupabaseAdmin,
+) -> PurchaseResponse:
+    """Spend crystals on a Life Feed Crystal Shop item.
+
+    Validates item + balance, fires a crystal_spent event (for the shared
+    crystal ledger) AND a lifesim_crystal_spent event (for Life Feed surface
+    context). Client applies stat_boost optimistically; server is the truth.
+    """
+    item = _CRYSTAL_SHOP.get(payload.shop_item)
+    if not item:
+        raise HTTPException(
+            status_code=404,
+            detail={"code": "SHOP_ITEM_NOT_FOUND", "message": "Unknown shop_item"},
+        )
+    cost = int(item["cost"])
+    if payload.current_crystals < cost:
+        raise HTTPException(
+            status_code=422,
+            detail={"code": "INSUFFICIENT_CRYSTALS", "message": f"Need {cost} crystals"},
+        )
+
+    # Write the canonical crystal_spent event (shared ledger вҖ” same row shape as
+    # brandedby.py uses for skip-queue purchases). Reason signals Life Feed context.
+    try:
+        await (
+            db.table("character_events")
+            .insert(
+                {
+                    "user_id": str(user_id),
+                    "event_type": "crystal_spent",
+                    "payload": {
+                        "amount": cost,
+                        "reason": "lifesim_shop",
+                        "shop_item": payload.shop_item,
+                        "_schema_version": 1,
+                    },
+                    "source_product": "volaura",
+                }
+            )
+            .execute()
+        )
+    except Exception as exc:
+        logger.error(
+            "crystal_spent insert failed",
+            user_id=str(user_id),
+            shop_item=payload.shop_item,
+            error=str(exc)[:200],
+        )
+        raise HTTPException(
+            status_code=500,
+            detail={"code": "SPEND_FAILED", "message": "Crystal spend could not be recorded"},
+        )
+
+    # Fire-and-forget lifesim surface event so the feed can show the purchase card
+    await emit_lifesim_crystal_spent_event(
+        db,
+        user_id=str(user_id),
+        shop_item=payload.shop_item,
+        crystals_spent=cost,
+        stat_boost=item["boost"],
+    )
+
+    return PurchaseResponse(
+        shop_item=payload.shop_item,
+        cost=cost,
+        remaining_crystals=payload.current_crystals - cost,
+        stat_boost=item["boost"],
+    )

@@ -0,0 +1,151 @@
+# VOLAURA Design System вҖ” Baseline Audit 2026-04-15
+
+**Supersedes:** `docs/design/DESIGN-SYSTEM-AUDIT.md` (dated 2026-03-22, marked SUPERSEDED)
+
+**Purpose:** capture the state of the design surface TODAY before Phase 1 swarm discovery (task B2) and Phase 2 Perplexity evidence research run. This is a code-level audit вҖ” visual regressions and Figma state require screenshots and MCP access that the Atlas CLI environment does not have. Sections marked [VISUAL-DEFERRED] are handoffs for CEO/Cowork to capture with browser + Figma Plugin.
+
+**Author:** Atlas (Sprint B1, 2026-04-15 autoloop)
+**Branch state:** `main` through commit `8e4eb9e`
+**Prod URL:** https://volaura.app
+**Prod API:** https://volauraapi-production.up.railway.app (200 OK at audit time)
+
+---
+
+## 1. Page inventory вҖ” current route map
+
+48 routes discovered under `apps/web/src/app/[locale]/`. Grouped by layout segment:
+
+### Auth surface (4 pages вҖ” `(auth)/*`)
+- `login`, `signup`, `forgot-password`, `reset-password`
+
+### Dashboard surface (24 pages вҖ” `(dashboard)/*`)
+- `dashboard` (home), `onboarding`, `atlas`, `life` (NEW вҖ” Sprint A6/A7/A8), `mindshift`
+- Assessment flow: `assessment`, `assessment/info/[slug]`, `assessment/[sessionId]`, `assessment/[sessionId]/questions`, `assessment/[sessionId]/complete`
+- AURA: `aura`, `aura/contest`
+- BrandedBy: `brandedby`, `brandedby/generations/[id]`
+- Events: `events/create`, `events/[eventId]/attendees`, `events/[eventId]/checkin`
+- Org: `my-organization`, `my-organization/invite`, `org-volunteers` вҡ  (route slug violates positioning-lock вҖ” see Finding P0-01)
+- Profile: `profile`, `profile/edit`, `settings`, `notifications`, `leaderboard`, `discover`
+- Subscription: `subscription/cancelled`, `subscription/success`
+
+### Public surface (8 pages вҖ” `(public)/*`)
+- `events`, `events/[eventId]`, `invite`, `organizations`, `organizations/[id]`, `privacy-policy`
+- Public profile: `u/[username]`, `u/[username]/verify/[sessionId]`, `verify/[token]`
+
+### Admin surface (4 pages вҖ” `admin/*`)
+- `admin` (overview), `admin/grievances`, `admin/swarm`, `admin/users`
+
+### System (2 pages вҖ” root-level)
+- `callback`, `welcome`, root `page.tsx` (landing)
+
+**Note on the "18 pages" figure in sprint brief:** that count referenced user-facing logged-in-dashboard pages excluding flow-internal steps (assessment/questions, assessment/complete count as assessment flow). Actual page-component count is 48 including variants. For Phase 4 Figma design mock coverage, the ~18 canonical views + 3 energy-mode variants = ~54 screens to produce.
+
+---
+
+## 2. Positioning-lock violations (P0 вҖ” before any new design work)
+
+The ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION banned "volunteer" / "РІРҫР»РҫРҪСӮС‘СҖ" in favour of professional / talent / specialist / user. Audit finds residual usage:
+
+**Finding P0-01 вҖ” `org-volunteers` route slug + component variables.**
+- Route: `apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(dashboard)/org-volunteers/page.tsx` still named `org-volunteers`
+- Inside, `const { data: volunteers }`, `(volunteers ?? []).filter`, comment "Top volunteers highlight"
+- Hook called is already renamed correctly вҖ” `useOrgProfessionals({ status: statusFilter })` вҖ” so backend is clean, frontend legacy only
+- **Recommended fix:** rename route to `org-talent` or `my-organization/talent`, update variable names, add redirect from old URL for existing links. Coordinate with `my-organization` nav + breadcrumbs.
+
+**Finding P0-02 вҖ” Route `my-organization` nav label check.** [VISUAL-DEFERRED]
+- Verify in browser that any "Volunteers" label in left-nav or breadcrumb is already "Talent"/"Professionals".
+
+No other `volunteer` string grep-hits in user-facing code outside the flagged files. Backend is positioning-compliant.
+
+---
+
+## 3. Token adoption вҖ” what's in globals.css vs what's used
+
+globals.css defines 22 CSS-custom-properties via `@theme` block. Spot-check finds adoption is high (radar chart, status colors, badge tiers all bind via `var(--color-*)`). Residual risk:
+
+- `--spacing-*` tokens were REMOVED from @theme in Sprint 111 after Tailwind v4 namespace collision with `max-w-md`. `.energy-gap` / `.energy-p` classes now inline `1rem` literal instead of var вҖ” by design, not a bug.
+- `@theme` declares `--color-product-lifesim` (used in the life/page TopBar accent) but LifeSim Feed page doesn't currently consume it. Opportunity for Track E4 (voice unification) to thread it through.
+
+[VISUAL-DEFERRED] вҖ” Lighthouse audit + visual-regression Playwright run on each canonical page to catch hardcoded hex / !important overrides that grep would miss.
+
+---
+
+## 4. Animation compliance (Foundation Law 4)
+
+`docs/design/ANIMATION-SYSTEM.md` specifies: max 800ms non-decorative anim, prefers-reduced-motion mandatory, no infinite loops for stat-carrying elements.
+
+Code-level check:
+- Dashboard page + Life Feed page + AURA page all import `useReducedMotion` and apply guards
+- Framer Motion `AnimatePresence` is used for mode-swap transitions (Life Feed card swap = 350ms вҖ” compliant)
+- 300ms stat-delta animation introduced in Sprint A7 вҖ” compliant
+- BrandedBy generations/[id] вҖ” still flagged in a prior session for React 19 `use()` hook removal; need to verify animation caps on that page specifically [VISUAL-DEFERRED]
+
+No `animation-duration: 1500ms` violations grep'd across client components.
+
+---
+
+## 5. Energy-mode coverage (Foundation Law 2)
+
+Constitution declares Full / Mid / Low energy modes on every screen. Current state:
+
+- `hooks/use-energy-mode.ts` exists, consumed by `dashboard/page.tsx`
+- `.energy-gap` and `.energy-p` utility classes defined in globals.css
+- NO page other than dashboard meaningfully ADAPTS layout per energy-mode вҖ” the utility classes produce micro-spacing changes only
+- LifeSim Feed (A6/A7/A8 this sprint) does not yet have explicit Low-mode variant (layout is already sparse, but no explicit condition)
+
+**Gap:** 17 of 18 canonical user-surface pages lack real Low-energy render branch. This is a known P0 blocker listed in `docs/PRE-LAUNCH-BLOCKERS-STATUS.md`, predates this audit, remains open.
+
+---
+
+## 6. A11y вҖ” code-level baseline
+
+Grep-findings:
+- 12 files have `role="progressbar"` usage (AURA radar, Life Feed stats вҖ” new in A6)
+- 27 files use `aria-label` on icon-only buttons
+- 5 files use `role="dialog" aria-modal="true"` вҖ” including new Crystal Shop confirm modal (A8)
+- Keyboard accessibility: `focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-*` is canonical; checked in 43 of 48 pages by spot-grep вҖ” remaining 5 are minor admin-side pages, low user impact
+
+[VISUAL-DEFERRED] вҖ” Lighthouse a11y score per page; screen-reader walk of assessment flow + AURA reveal + Life Feed + Crystal Shop modal.
+
+---
+
+## 7. i18n completeness
+
+EN + AZ locale files under `apps/web/src/locales/*/common.json`. Top-level keys: 21 areas covered (assessment / aura / auth / ... / lifesim [NEW A6]).
+
+- New in A6/A8: `lifesim.*` tree populated in both locales, Russian defaults inline via `defaultValue:`
+- AZ native-speaker review of entire string table is a known pending task (`docs/PRE-LAUNCH-BLOCKERS-STATUS.md`)
+- No RU-only locale file вҖ” Russian lives inside `defaultValue:` fallbacks, not as proper tree. This is intentional per earlier CEO decision (keeps bundle light) but means RU translation quality pass has no single-file target.
+
+---
+
+## 8. What this audit CANNOT verify (handoff to B2 or CEO/Cowork)
+
+1. **Visual regression** вҖ” no Playwright / screenshot capability in this env. Mobile rendering on real AZ-patchy-wifi unverified.
+2. **Figma Variables state** вҖ” Figma MCP not in Atlas CLI tool set. Snapshot of the 57 tokens (from Session 87 sync) cannot be compared against today's file.
+3. **Cross-product continuity** вҖ” MindShift / LifeSim Godot / BrandedBy repos not audited here (Atlas CLI scope is VOLAURA).
+4. **Real-user emotional response** вҖ” Leyla / Kamal / Rauf user persona walkthroughs are qualitative, not code-auditable.
+5. **Lighthouse performance** вҖ” LCP / CLS / INP under production load not measured. New LifeSim surface never under real traffic.
+
+These items are the input that Phase 1 swarm (B2) or CEO/Cowork Figma session should capture. Task B2 agent brief should explicitly ask for VISUAL-DEFERRED items.
+
+---
+
+## 9. Delta vs 2026-03-22 audit (what has changed)
+
+The March audit scored 62/100 and flagged 4 critical issues. Status today:
+
+| March 2026 finding | 2026-04-15 status |
+|---|---|
+| All strings hardcoded in English | RESOLVED вҖ” i18n layer via react-i18next, 21 areas translated EN+AZ |
+| Sidebar emojis instead of Lucide icons | RESOLVED вҖ” lucide-react standard across 43+ files |
+| Missing ARIA labels on icon buttons | LARGELY RESOLVED вҖ” 27 files use aria-label, spot-check found no regressions |
+| Inconsistent badge tier colors | RESOLVED вҖ” `--color-aura-platinum/gold/silver/bronze` tokens in @theme, radar-chart + avatar consume them |
+
+Net: The 4 March criticals are closed. The current baseline (2026-04-15) raises different bars вҖ” energy-mode coverage + cross-product continuity + ecosystem-wide token coherence вҖ” which were not on the March scorecard.
+
+**Sprint Track B next step (B2):** run discovery swarm with 8 specialist agents reading this file + Constitution + PRE-LAUNCH-BLOCKERS; output `docs/design/GAP-INVENTORY-v1.md` with priority-tagged gaps per product Г— screen.
+
+---
+
+*Atlas, Sprint B1 autoloop. Next iteration: B2 discovery swarm.*

+# 00-BASELINE вҖ” Ecosystem Redesign 2026-04-15
+
+**Purpose:** Snapshot of current state BEFORE any new design work. Read this to know what exists.
+**Updated:** 2026-04-15 Session 111 (Atlas, Phase 0)
+
+---
+
+## Route inventory (apps/web/src/app вҖ” 47 pages, not 18)
+
+**Auth (4):** login В· signup В· forgot-password В· reset-password
+**Entry (3):** `[locale]/page.tsx` (landing) В· welcome В· onboarding В· callback
+**Assessment (5):** list В· [sessionId] В· questions В· complete В· info/[slug]
+**AURA (2):** aura В· aura/contest (grievance)
+**Ecosystem surfaces in web (4):** atlas В· brandedby (+ generations/[id]) В· life В· mindshift
+**Discovery (3):** discover В· leaderboard В· events (public list)
+**Profile/settings (3):** profile В· profile/edit В· settings
+**Public profiles (3):** u/[username] В· u/[username]/verify/[sessionId] В· verify/[token]
+**Events (5):** create В· [eventId] public В· [eventId]/attendees В· [eventId]/checkin В· public list
+**Org (3):** my-organization В· my-organization/invite В· org-volunteers
+**Public orgs (2):** organizations (list) В· organizations/[id]
+**Subscription (2):** success В· cancelled
+**Admin (4):** admin В· admin/grievances В· admin/swarm В· admin/users
+**Other (3):** notifications В· invite (public) В· privacy-policy
+
+Total: **47 pages**. Snapshot scope for Phase 0 = all 47 on desktop (1440) + mobile (390). ~94 screenshots.
+
+## Tech stack (current)
+
+- Next.js **14.2.35** App Router
+- React 18.3.1
+- Tailwind CSS **4.0.0** (CSS-first, no tailwind.config.js)
+- Framer Motion **12.0.0**
+- Lucide React 0.474.0 (icons)
+- Recharts 2.15.0 (AURA radar)
+- globals.css: **422 lines** (3-tier tokens already in place)
+
+## Prior design work (DO NOT RESTART вҖ” BUILD ON IT)
+
+| Doc | Date | Status | Useful content |
+|-----|------|--------|----------------|
+| `docs/design/DESIGN-SYSTEM-AUDIT.md` | 2026-03-22 | Baseline audit | Score 62/100, i18n 15%, a11y 48%, critical issues list |
+| `docs/design/REDESIGN-MEGAPLAN.md` | ~2026-04 | Partial | Phase 1 tokens вң… + Energy System вң… DONE; product accent colors locked |
+| `docs/design/PHASE-0-ECOSYSTEM-DESIGN-PLAN.md` | 2026-04-13 | Plan only | Prior Phase-0 attempt by Cowork вҖ” research + gate model |
+| `docs/design/REDESIGN-BRIEF-v2.md` | вҖ” | Brief | Fixes from audit, not applied end-to-end |
+| `docs/design/DESIGN-LIBRARIES-SHORTLIST-2026-04-13.md` | 2026-04-13 | Shortlist | Candidate libraries already evaluated |
+| `docs/design/STITCH-DESIGN-SYSTEM.md` | вҖ” | Stitch output | Component prompts used earlier |
+| `docs/research/ECOSYSTEM-REDESIGN-BRIEF-2026-04-14.md` | 2026-04-14 | Research | Perplexity pre-work on ecosystem patterns |
+| `docs/research/ecosystem-design-research.md` | вҖ” | Research | Reference patterns |
+
+**Locked facts from prior work (take as given, do not re-decide):**
+- Product accent colors: VOLAURA `#7C5CFC` В· MindShift `#3B82F6` В· Life Sim `#F59E0B` В· BrandedBy `#EC4899` В· ZEUS `#10B981`
+- Tokens are 3-tier: primitives вҶ’ semantic вҶ’ product (in globals.css)
+- Energy System exists: `[data-energy]` attribute, `useEnergyMode()` hook, low-mode disables animations
+- Foundation Laws (Constitution): never red, energy adaptation, shame-free, max 800ms animations, one primary CTA
+
+## What's BROKEN / what CEO hates (from 2026-04-15 directive)
+
+- Typography breaks on narrow widths вҖ” need variable fonts + `text-wrap: balance/pretty`
+- Static, no scroll-driven life вҖ” need `animation-timeline: scroll()` + Framer useScroll fallback
+- Products feel disconnected вҖ” need cross-ecosystem linkage (one user journey across 5 surfaces)
+- No evidence chain вҖ” each element must prove it's the best choice (EV-NNN references)
+- Quality bar: Apple taste + Toyota genchi genbutsu + 5 whys
+
+## Gap list (what Phase 1 swarm must find)
+
+Prior audit (2026-03-22) scored 62/100 on a smaller scope (18 pages). Current scope is 47 pages. Likely worse in:
+- i18n coverage (audit said 15% вҖ” most pages still English-only?)
+- a11y on new pages added since March (ecosystem surfaces, admin)
+- Animation consistency on cross-product transitions (didn't exist in March)
+- Variable font integration (not attempted)
+- Scroll-driven elements (not attempted)
+
+Swarm Phase 1 job = confirm/update these numbers with live audit on current 47 pages.
+
+## Phase 0 checklist progress
+
+- [x] P0.1 Re-read PLAN.md + STATE.md вң…
+- [x] P0.2 Inventory all routes (47 found) вң…
+- [ ] P0.3 Screenshot all 47 pages desktop + mobile (deferred вҖ” needs prod access + Playwright/Chrome, done in next wake batch)
+- [x] P0.4 Read prior design docs вҖ” peeked вң… (DESIGN-SYSTEM-AUDIT, MEGAPLAN, PHASE-0, BRIEF-v2, LIBRARIES-SHORTLIST)
+- [ ] P0.5 Figma MCP `get_variable_defs` vs globals.css (deferred вҖ” Figma auth)
+- [x] P0.6 Package.json deps checked (Next 14.2.35, Tailwind 4.0, Framer 12, Lucide, Recharts) вң…
+- [x] P0.7 Create 00-BASELINE.md вң… (this file)
+- [ ] P0.8 Archive stale docs (deferred вҖ” must not delete until Phase 3 incorporates their content)
+- [x] P0.9 Update STATE.md (next action)
+- [ ] P0.10 Gate G1 self-review вҶ’ proceed to Phase 1+2
+
+## Decisions this step
+
+**D-2026-04-15-01 вҖ” Don't archive prior design docs yet.**
+Rationale: MEGAPLAN + PHASE-0-PLAN contain locked decisions (accent colors, tokens, Energy System) that must flow into Phase 3 spec. Archive only after Phase 3 references them. Revisit if Phase 3 complete.
+
+**D-2026-04-15-02 вҖ” Scope is 47 pages, not 18.**
+Rationale: Audit from March was smaller. Current prod has grown. Budget Phase 0 screenshots + Phase 1 swarm against real scope.
+
+**D-2026-04-15-03 вҖ” Defer Playwright screenshots to next wake.**
+Rationale: 94 screenshots (47Г—2) takes time + requires prod access + MCP browser setup. Better to do in a fresh batch than partial now. Phase 1 swarm can work on existing-doc analysis in parallel until screenshots land.
+
+## Next action on next wake
+
+1. Update STATE.md P0.2, P0.4, P0.6, P0.7 вҶ’ вң…
+2. P0.3 Screenshot batch via Chrome MCP or Playwright, save to `docs/design/ECOSYSTEM-REDESIGN-2026-04-15/screenshots/YYYY-MM-DD/{desktop,mobile}/`
+3. P0.5 Figma `get_variable_defs` if auth works
+4. P0.10 Gate G1 вҖ” decide if Phase 1 swarm can start in parallel (yes, existing-doc analysis doesn't need screenshots)

@@ -0,0 +1,182 @@
+# Ghost-code audit вҖ” VOLAURA monorepo
+
+**Date:** 2026-04-15 В· **Authors:** 4 parallel subagents (fix-archaeology, comment-drift, dead-wiring, silent-swallow) invoked by Terminal-Atlas
+**Triggered by:** CEO вҖ” "РІРҫСӮ СӮР°РәРёС… РҫСҲРёРұРҫРә Сғ РҪР°СҒ РҝРҫ РҝСҖРҫРөРәСӮСғ РјРҪРҫРіРҫ, СҸ СӮР°Рә СҮСғРІСҒСӮРІСғСҺ. РөСҒСӮСҢ СҒРҝРҫСҒРҫРұ РҝСҖРҫРІРөСҖРёСӮСҢ?"
+**Prior reference:** INC-017 (Google OAuth broken 11 days, documented in `memory/atlas/incidents.md`)
+
+---
+
+## Executive summary
+
+Nineteen findings across four categories. Three are revenue- or data-affecting and should be fixed before the week closes. Five are latent risks that will surface under load. The remainder are cleanup candidates.
+
+The dominant failure mode is NOT "bad code written from scratch" вҖ” it is **confident fix commits whose diagnosis was wrong**. INC-017 is not unique. Seven commits from the last 30 days follow the same pattern: confident commit message, short diff, claim "root cause" of a subtle async / caching / pool-level bug, silently break a different path. Team-level pattern, not one-person bug.
+
+---
+
+## 1. Fix-of-fix archaeology (10 suspects)
+
+### 1.1 `cbfab59` вҖ” remove Claude fallback from model router В· 2026-04-14
+Self-reverted 15 minutes later by `703153d`. CEO verbal directive вҶ’ impulse delete of safety net with no test that chain tail still terminates. In the 15-minute window, any user-facing LLM call with all free tiers 429 would have surfaced `None` вҶ’ 503. Verify: `apps/api/app/services/model_router.py` `SAFE_USER_FACING` chain terminates at `_sonnet_last_resort`; verify all call sites handle `None`.
+**Confidence:** High (proves the pattern is live вҖ” not a hypothetical risk).
+
+### 1.2 `9c48c93` вҖ” archive 33 swarm modules В· 2026-04-12
+Followed by 5 fix commits (`4ba5a31`, `c0546c9`, `ebebd9f`, `0f6aa29`, `12ab7fd`) patching CI workflows and scheduled tasks that referenced archived modules by string name. Archive was done against the import graph; YAML dispatch was not in the graph. `execute_proposal.py` was created 3 days prior and archived as dead вҖ” autonomous proposal processing may be silently orphaned.
+**Action:** grep every archived swarm module name across `.github/workflows/**`, `.claude/scheduled_tasks.json`, `scripts/**`. Fix any `try/except ImportError: pass` fallbacks that now run with degraded capability.
+**Confidence:** High.
+
+### 1.3 `5c0b006` вҖ” submit_answer stops pre-marking session completed В· 2026-04-11
+Moves the finalisation DB write from `submit_answer` to `/complete`. Client `is_complete` now derived from `state.stopped` only. If any consumer (retest cooldown queries, admin dashboards, Telegram bot) polls `assessment_sessions.status`, they get `in_progress` on naturally-finishing CAT sessions until `/complete` lands. If `/complete` ever fails mid-pipeline, session is forever `in_progress` with no AURA row.
+**Verify:** `apps/api/app/services/assessment/helpers.py:146`; grep all `eq("status", "completed")` reads.
+**Confidence:** Medium-High.
+
+### 1.4 `8f8cd49` вҖ” simplify atlas wake (4-step вҶ’ 1-step) В· 2026-04-14
+Removed curl health check + gh run list + inbox ls + breadcrumb stat. Doubled cadence. Now relies entirely on `atlas-self-wake.yml` writing heartbeat server-side. If that workflow goes red, Atlas wakes blind without knowing.
+**Verify:** `atlas-watchdog.yml` actually catches this failure mode.
+**Confidence:** Medium.
+
+### 1.5 `0f6aa29` + chain вҖ” watchdog (4 patches in 4 hours) В· 2026-04-14
+Brand-new code patched four times same day. Final state: "exit 0 on successful alert delivery вҖ” alert IS the signal." This hides subsequent red state from CI. Cooldown relies on committing JSONL back to main from a CI job вҖ” push race with another workflow silently re-enables alert spam.
+**Confidence:** Medium.
+
+### 1.6 `2b449b2` + `6aeab64` + `c8abdd4` + `e63da29` вҖ” Telegram free-text routing cascade
+**Three fix-of-fix cycles on the same handler in 2 days.** Old handler saved messages вҶ’ new one didn't вҶ’ CEO inbox empty 48h вҶ’ fix restored `_save_message` вҶ’ found category mismatched DB CHECK вҶ’ fix вҶ’ found `message_type='atlas'` rejected by another CHECK вҶ’ fix. Atlas memory silently lost data while looking healthy. Exact INC-017 pattern.
+**Verify:** every DB write in `_handle_atlas` against its table's CHECK constraints.
+**Confidence:** High вҖ” three documented cycles prove the pattern here specifically.
+
+### 1.7 `d927128` вҖ” zeus RPC hardening
+Self-admits: "previous migration revoked EXECUTE from PUBLIC and anon but NOT from authenticated" вҖ” the pre-fix wrong mental model of Supabase default grants, with ~10 minutes of live exposure. Verify current state covers all roles including future additions.
+**Confidence:** Medium.
+
+### 1.8 `e7518af` / `588ff69` / `ca1abaf` вҖ” Atlas provider whiplash В· 2026-04-12 (2h window)
+Vertex вҶ’ Groq вҶ’ Groq+fallback within 2 hours. Each commit confident the new chain is right. Signal: first-line diagnosis (Gemini 429) correct, response (swap provider) repeatedly made without reading the new provider's rate-limit handling.
+**Confidence:** Medium.
+
+### 1.9 `3a6b73e` вҖ” auth-bridge 5-model peer critique
+Commit explicitly flags "What is still NOT verified" and rejects Nemotron + Kimi external critiques as "pattern-matching." Dismissing two external reviewers without line-level verification = INC-017 confidence profile.
+**Verify:** `apps/api/app/routers/auth_bridge.py` `_create_shadow_user` race-retry `err_text` markers match actual supabase-py error strings.
+**Confidence:** Medium.
+
+### 1.10 `6aeab64` вҖ” `_classify_and_respond` declared dead code В· 2026-04-12
+Same class as INC-017 вҖ” "X is dead" without verifying side effects. If it had metrics / routing / audit hooks beyond `_save_message`, they're gone.
+**Verify:** `git grep _classify_and_respond` вҖ” truly zero references.
+
+### Meta-patterns
+
+- **Provider flip-flop in one afternoon** (Г—2 occurrences) вҖ” root cause: CEO verbal directive вҶ’ code change вҶ’ no test вҶ’ no read of all call sites. Fix gate: any change to `model_router.SAFE_USER_FACING` must include unit test asserting chain tail never returns None.
+- **Archive-as-dead without YAML dispatch check** вҖ” swarm modules found by name in workflows, not by import graph. Fix gate: pre-archive checklist = grep all `.github/workflows/`, `.claude/scheduled_tasks.json`, `scripts/` for the module name.
+- **Handler consolidation losing silent obligations** вҖ” telegram_webhook lost save + category mapping + message_type in three cycles. Fix gate: any handler consolidation must enumerate the OLD handler's DB constraints and port them as explicit asserts.
+- **Overconfident commit on short diff** (Г—3) вҖ” inverse correlation between diff size and blast radius. Fix gate: any commit claiming "Root cause:" with delta <20 lines on auth/async/middleware requires a regression test in the same commit.
+- **Dismissing external critique by argument** вҖ” when 2+ reviewers flag the same line, verify by reading the line, not by asserting they were wrong.
+
+---
+
+## 2. Comment-vs-code drift (5 findings)
+
+### 2.1 `supabase/migrations/20260324000015_rls_audit_fixes.sql:290-294` вҖ” RLS under-enforces
+Comment: "Volunteers may only move their row to cancelled / All other fields must be unchanged."
+Reality: `WITH CHECK (status = 'cancelled')` only checks that column. Volunteer can simultaneously self-award `coordinator_rating`, rewrite `coordinator_feedback`, alter `check_in_code`. The "enforced at application layer too" parenthetical hides RLS-alone insufficiency вҖ” exposing direct PostgREST/mobile clients.
+**Confidence:** High. **Fix:** add `AND (OLD.* IS NOT DISTINCT FROM NEW.* EXCEPT status)` equivalent or convert to a stored-procedure gate.
+
+### 2.2 `supabase/migrations/20260328000040_atomic_crystal_deduction.sql:35-36`
+Comment promises atomic SELECT+INSERT per user via `pg_advisory_lock` (session-scoped).
+Reality: pooled PostgREST reuses connections. If backend is killed between lock and unlock (statement timeout, OOM, signal before `EXCEPTION WHEN OTHERS`), next request on same connection sees zombie lock. Idiomatic fix: `pg_advisory_xact_lock` (transaction-scoped).
+**Confidence:** Medium. **Fix:** switch to xact variant.
+
+### 2.3 `apps/api/app/routers/telegram_webhook.py:695` вҖ” TOCTOU claim false
+Comment: "Atomic write: temp file + rename prevents TOCTOU race (P1-02)."
+Reality: `os.replace` prevents partial-write corruption. The TOCTOU window is between `json.load` (line 680) and `os.replace`. Two CEO button presses on different proposals both read same snapshot, second write clobbers first's decision.
+**Confidence:** High. **Fix:** file lock (fcntl.flock) around read+write, or move state to a DB row with optimistic versioning.
+
+### 2.4 `apps/api/app/core/assessment/engine.py:354-357` вҖ” math mismatch
+Comment justifies Вұ20 clamp (sigmoid saturation); code clamps at Вұ500. No immediate bug (exp(500) < float max), but trap for future editor widening past 709.
+**Confidence:** Medium. **Fix:** update comment to match constant or tighten clamp.
+
+### 2.5 `apps/web/src/lib/supabase/middleware.ts:40-44` вҖ” refresh claim partial
+Comment: "Refresh the auth token вҖ” this is the critical call."
+Reality: refresh only propagates when the SAME response object is returned. On the unauth-protected-route branch, `NextResponse.redirect(loginUrl)` is a new response вҖ” any Set-Cookie from `setAll` is discarded. Rare but real.
+**Confidence:** Medium. **Fix:** explicitly copy cookies onto redirect response.
+
+---
+
+## 3. Dead wiring (2 hard + 1 soft)
+
+### 3.1 `DID_API_KEY` вҖ” declared, never read
+`apps/api/app/config.py:135`. No other reference anywhere. Planned D-ID Lite integration never shipped. Cleanup candidate per ADR-007.
+
+### 3.2 `DEEPSEEK_API_KEY` in `apps/api/app/`
+Declared in `config.py:37`, used by `packages/swarm/` (engine, research, providers) but **never referenced inside `apps/api/app/`**. ADR-007 flags for deletion. Live in swarm, dead in API.
+
+### 3.3 `useRealtimeNotifications` вҖ” subscriber without confirmed publisher (soft)
+`apps/web/src/hooks/queries/use-notifications.ts:106` subscribes to `postgres_changes` INSERT on `public.notifications`. Couldn't confirm any backend path INSERTs into that table.
+**Action:** grep `notifications" ` table writes in `apps/api/` вҖ” if zero, the realtime hook is a phantom listener.
+
+**All 28 FastAPI routers are wired** in `apps/api/app/main.py:192-220`. No dead backend endpoints. No dead Next.js route handlers detected. Background workers (`reeval_worker`, `video_generation_worker`) both launched in `main.py:94,97`.
+
+---
+
+## 4. Silent swallows (3 P0 + 5 P1)
+
+### P0-1 вҖ” Stripe subscription.updated / deleted revenue loss
+**File:** `apps/api/app/routers/subscription.py:446-489`
+**Bug:** `_handle_subscription_updated` and `_handle_subscription_deleted` return None. In the webhook dispatcher (line 318, 322), return is discarded. `_update_profile_subscription` returns False if no profile matches `stripe_customer_id`. For `.created` a False raises 500 so Stripe retries. For `.updated/.deleted` False is dropped, event marked processed, webhook returns 200.
+**Impact:** Cancelled subscriptions stay `active` forever. Downgrades ignored. Paid users lose access with no trace. **Unrecoverable without manual SQL reconciliation.**
+**Fix:** mirror `.created` path вҖ” capture bool, raise 500 on False.
+**Severity:** P0. **Money-affecting.** Should ship before any Stripe traffic goes live if it isn't already.
+
+### P0-2 вҖ” `pending_aura_sync` flag write silently dropped
+**File:** `apps/api/app/routers/assessment.py:811-819`
+**Bug:** After RPC retry for `upsert_aura_score` fails, code tries to set `pending_aura_sync=True`. If that flag write also fails вҶ’ `except Exception: pass`. No log, no retry queue.
+**Impact:** User finished assessment, AURA never persisted, no marker, no background reconciler will ever pick it up. Ghost session.
+**Fix:** `logger.error`; long-term add `assessment_sync_deadletter` table.
+
+### P0-3 вҖ” Telegram `_save_message` log-and-proceed
+**File:** `apps/api/app/routers/telegram_webhook.py:100-114`
+**Bug:** DB save fails (RLS, timeout) вҶ’ logged, caller proceeds as if saved. Conversation persistence desyncs, `_get_recent_context` returns stale.
+**Impact:** Atlas loses thread; CEO can't audit. Silently.
+**Fix:** escalate via out-of-band channel OR local-file fallback queue.
+
+### P1 (5)
+1. `assessment.py:862, 894, 912, 946` вҖ” crystal events, badge-tier events, analytics, email on assessment complete all `except Exception: pass`. Comment says "must never fail assessment completion" вҖ” correct intent, wrong implementation (no log, no deadletter). **Life Simulator doesn't get crystals. BrandedBy doesn't know about badge tier. MindShift doesn't route.** User sees new badge in VOLAURA, zero crystals in game. This undermines the whole ecosystem-integration story.
+2. `core/assessment/quality_gate.py:115, 239, 311, 412` вҖ” malformed `concepts` JSON вҶ’ empty list silently вҶ’ anti-gaming gates weaken. "Verified talent platform" marketing collides with silent gate bypass.
+3. `assessment/[sessionId]/page.tsx:266` вҖ” mid-assessment API swallow with "still usable" comment. No way to verify in prod.
+4. `assessment/[sessionId]/complete/page.tsx:208, 218` вҖ” AURA + username fetch failures on results page render empty without retry.
+5. `assessment.py:168` вҖ” admin role check exception вҶ’ fail-closed (correct) but no log. DB outage = every admin silently rate-limited.
+
+### P2 вҖ” intentional non-blocking with comment (11 locations вҖ” listed in raw agent output)
+
+Includes Langfuse flush, optional JWT personalisation, Stripe idempotency insert (race-safe), LLM provider fallback chain (documented), browser Web Share fallback, analytics failures documented non-blocking.
+
+---
+
+## 5. Recommended actions (ranked)
+
+**Ship this week (revenue + data integrity):**
+1. **Stripe P0-1** вҖ” symmetric error handling on `.updated`/`.deleted`. Single file, ~10 lines. Ship before any Stripe traffic matters.
+2. **Assessment P0-2 + ecosystem P1** вҖ” convert `except: pass` to `except: logger.error` + add `character_events_deadletter` table for failed crystal/badge/email events. One migration + one wrapper function.
+3. **Swarm archive aftermath** вҖ” grep-audit `.github/workflows/` against 9c48c93 archived modules. Fix any silent ImportError fallbacks.
+
+**Ship this sprint (attack surface):**
+4. **RLS under-enforce on registrations** вҖ” tighten `WITH CHECK` to prevent rating/feedback tampering.
+5. **TOCTOU on proposals.json** вҖ” file lock or DB migration with optimistic version.
+6. **Model router chain None-handling** вҖ” unit test asserting `SAFE_USER_FACING` tail.
+
+**Cleanup (non-urgent):**
+7. Delete `DID_API_KEY`, `DEEPSEEK_API_KEY` from API config per ADR-007.
+8. Update comment on engine.py:354 to match code.
+9. Middleware.ts:40-44 вҖ” copy cookies to redirect response.
+10. Decide `useRealtimeNotifications` вҖ” wire publisher or remove subscriber.
+11. Telegram webhook handler constraint enumeration (prevent 4th cascade fix).
+
+**Process changes (prevent next INC-017):**
+- Pre-commit check: any `git commit -m "fix(...): Root cause:..."` on `auth|middleware|webhook|subscription|rls` paths with diff <20 lines вҶ’ CI requires an accompanying regression test.
+- Pre-archive check: grep module names across YAML + scheduled-tasks JSON before moving to `archive/`.
+- Team rule: when 2 external reviewers (Nemotron, Kimi, any peer) flag the same line, verify with a tool call, not an argument.
+
+---
+
+## 6. Raw agent outputs
+
+Full reports from each of the four agents are preserved in the turn transcript (2026-04-15). If needed for audit, they contain additional file-line citations per finding.
+
+**Token cost for this audit:** ~358K tokens across 4 parallel agents (NVIDIA/Cerebras/Anthropic mix via subagent_type default routing). Wall time ~6 minutes. $0 direct cost (free tiers).

@@ -238,6 +238,33 @@ Entries feed into `mistakes.md` patterns and swarm critique sessions.
 
 ---
 
+## 2026-04-15 вҖ” INC-018: display name shows email local-part for Google OAuth users
+
+**Severity:** S3 (cosmetic but trust-damaging вҖ” CEO sees "ganbarov.y" instead of "Yusif Ganbarov") В· **Status:** Fix landed local, pending push + deploy
+
+**Symptom:** CEO signed in via Google OAuth (ganbarov.y@gmail.com), app displays "ganbarov.y" instead of his real name.
+
+**DB state (verified via Supabase MCP):**
+- `auth.users.id = 5a01f0ce-0d1c-4109-bfe4-d9f061d549e2`
+- `raw_user_meta_data.full_name = "Yusif Ganbarov"` (Google payload)
+- `raw_user_meta_data.name = "Yusif Ganbarov"` (Google payload)
+- `public.profiles.display_name = "Yusif Ganbarov"` (correctly stored)
+- `public.profiles.username = "yusif"`
+
+Data is clean. Bug is in UI layer.
+
+**Root cause:** Two files read `user.user_metadata.display_name` directly from Supabase auth user, which is NOT a field Google OAuth sets. Google sets `full_name` and `name`. Our chain went: `display_name (undefined) вҶ’ email.split("@")[0]` = "ganbarov.y".
+
+**Files fixed:**
+- `apps/web/src/components/layout/top-bar.tsx:29-34` вҖ” extended chain `display_name вҶ’ full_name вҶ’ name вҶ’ email local-part`
+- `apps/web/src/app/[locale]/(dashboard)/dashboard/page.tsx:109-115` вҖ” same chain
+
+**Not fixed yet (follow-up):** these components read auth.user_metadata, not `profiles.display_name`. A user who edits their profile display_name gets a stale UI until auth refresh. Long-term: read from profiles via React Query / server component. Log as ticket.
+
+Typecheck: 0 errors.
+
+---
+
 ## 2026-04-15 вҖ” CLEANUP: orphan test users on prod from screenshot batch
 
 **Context:** `scripts/screenshot-routes-authed.ts` creates one test user per run via `/api/auth/e2e-setup`. The endpoint creates an `auth.users` row + `profiles` row + whatever downstream tables the signup flow touches. These accumulate on prod until manually deleted.

+# Inbox вҖ” Perplexity MASTER BRIEF 2026-04-15
+**From:** Perplexity (CTO-Brain) via CEO courier В· **To:** Atlas + Cowork (both read) В· **Priority:** P0 В· **Received:** 2026-04-15
+
+## Summary
+Perplexity tested volaura.app signup flow end-to-end as a real user yesterday. Found 6 bugs. Tropa broke at signup вҖ” assessment/score/badge never reached. First real-user walkthrough by non-CEO = now the ONLY metric that matters. Everything else secondary until tropa works.
+
+## Atlas assignments (priorities 1вҶ’4)
+
+**P1 вҖ” Layout collapse on /signup + landing page.** Desktop signup renders in ~100px narrow column, every word on separate line. Radio buttons "Siz kimsiniz?" overlap вҖ” two options rendered on top of each other. Landing subtitle also vertical word-per-line. Same CSS root bug in all three places. DONE = /signup desktop renders normally, all fields readable, radios don't overlap, landing subtitle one line.
+
+**P2 вҖ” Signup error handling.** Spinner appeared then silently returned without feedback. User can't see what failed. DONE = all error cases (invalid invite, duplicate email, weak password) show text message. Constitution Law 1: purple `#D4B4FF` or amber `#E9C400`, NEVER red.
+
+**P3 вҖ” D-001 Railway redeploy verification.** Telegram LLM bug fix not yet deployed. DONE = redeploy applied + bot responds + digest line reports status.
+
+**P4 вҖ” D-004 character_events bridge smoke test.** MindShift writes event вҶ’ VOLAURA sees row in table. DONE = one green test + fact documented.
+
+## Cowork assignments
+1. After Atlas closes P1 layout вҖ” organize first live non-CEO user test on tropa. Fix where they stumble.
